caption: Two people in military camouflage uniforms and gear, including helmets and backpacks, walk away from the camera on a dirt path. The setting is an outdoor area with green trees and foliage in the background. The person on the right carries a weapon slung across their back. As the sequence progresses, the two individuals continue walking forward, moving further into the distance. The on-screen text "Hero Ukraine" appears in the upper left of the scene, accompanied by a red and white logo containing the number "13" in the upper right. The landscape consists of uneven, dark soil and lush greenery under an overcast sky. The movement is steady and consistent across the frames, showing the soldiers advancing along the trail through the rural terrain.
